**Title**: National primary energy supply by source  
**One-line**: Total primary energy supply (TPES) for India, broken down by source (coal, oil, gas, nuclear, hydro, renewables).

## Definition

Total primary energy supply (TPES) for India, broken down by source (coal, oil, gas, nuclear, hydro, renewables). Measured in million tonnes of oil equivalent (mtoe). From NITI Aayog ICED dashboard, sourced from MoSPI Energy Statistics India.
